name: World of Alice   Animal Numbers
description: World of Alice - Animal Numbers World of Alice - Animal Numbers is an educational game developed for children to teach numbers and their shapes. With Alices help, you will discover which numbers are hidden in the shape of animals. In World of Alice, learning is fun. Game developed by: Nau.Kids
instructions: Click on the number that corresponds to the image of the animal corresponding to its shape

name: Hangman Winter
description: Hangman Winter challenges you and you need to win, and to do this, guess the words, targets or letters and do not let the gallows appear. You have to do it gradually letter by letter and reach the solution. In the lower right part you have a button that can help you with an unknown letter. At the top you will see the topic in which the word is given, this will greatly facilitate your task.
instructions: Use mouse or touch on the screen

name: SpaceScape
description: Enjoy over 100 beautiful images from the NASA archives while you learn new words, expand your vocabulary and exercise your mind with these addictive word puzzles.
instructions: Touch Screen Mouse

name: Remove Balls
description: Try to remove all bubbles. Touch them and they will burst. Get higher score for the number.
instructions: Mouse touch
